nodes.context: Criminal drug gang based in St Paul's, Bristol, active in the 1990s.
Yardie gang that filled the power vacuum after Aggi Crew members were jailed in 1998.

edges.context: Turf war after Aggi Crew demanded taxes from Yardies; conflict included shootings and armed police patrols.
